# Table Tests

## Simple Table

| Name | Age | City |
|------|-----|------|
| Alice | 30 | NYC |
| Bob | 25 | LA |

## Alignment

| Left | Center | Right |
|:-----|:------:|------:|
| L1 | C1 | R1 |
| Left aligned | Centered | Right aligned |
| x | y | z |

## Single Column

| Header |
|--------|
| Row 1 |
| Row 2 |

## Wide Table

| ID | Name | Email | Department | Role | Salary | Start Date |
|----|------|-------|------------|------|--------|------------|
| 1 | Alice Johnson | alice@example.com | Engineering | Senior Dev | $150,000 | 2020-01-15 |
| 2 | Bob Smith | bob@example.com | Marketing | Manager | $120,000 | 2019-06-01 |
| 3 | Carol Williams | carol@example.com | Engineering | Staff Dev | $180,000 | 2018-03-20 |

## Table with Formatting

| Feature | Status | Notes |
|---------|--------|-------|
| **Bold** | Done | Works |
| *Italic* | Done | Works |
| `Code` | Done | Works |

## Empty Cells

| A | B | C |
|---|---|---|
| 1 |   | 3 |
|   | 2 |   |
| 1 | 2 | 3 |

## Unicode in Tables

| Code | Language | Greeting |
|-------|----------|----------|
| JP | 日本語 | こんにちは |
| KR | 한국어 | 안녕하세요 |
| RU | Русский | Привет |
